title: DevBook Generated Golden RAG Dataset
description: Shared, chunker-neutral RAG retrieval dataset. Each case lists the expected evidence sections (equal weight) keyed by source path, heading, and snippet. One question set scores every chunking strategy.

generatedAt.description: UTC timestamp when this dataset file was generated.

collection.description: Marker that this is the single shared dataset used for every chunking strategy.

expected.description: Expected evidence sections, all weighted equally for matching.

documentId.description: Source document id, kept for traceability. Not used for matching, which is chunker-neutral (source + heading + snippet).

heading.description: Section heading, when the source section has one. Omitted for headingless (preamble) sections.

citationLabel.description: Source path of the section. SearchEvaluation maps this onto SearchDocument.SourcePath for chunker-neutral matching.

text.description: Verbatim, whitespace-normalized snippet that appears in the source section and is used for snippet-containment matching.
